message:
feat(serve): implement WebSocket event persistence and backpressure

Add WSEventStore with ring buffer and SQLite persistence for WebSocket
event durability across reconnects. Supports cursor-based replay, topic
filtering with wildcards, dropped event tracking, and stream reset messages.

- ws_events.go: Ring buffer + SQLite hybrid storage, configurable retention
- ws_events_test.go: Coverage for store/retrieve, topic filter, overflow,
  dropped events, memory-only mode, and cursor reset detection
- beads.go: Stub for beads API routes (bd-2vzaq)
- server.go: Register beads routes

Closes bd-cs5x4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
